_comment: Deterministic stub model output for the NDA case. Deliberately imperfect so the scorecard demonstrates errors being caught: one spurious clause (indemnification), one wrong severity (definition flagged low, expected medium), one over-flag (governing_law), and one fabricated citation.

clauses.text: Defines Confidential Information broadly, including unmarked information.
Receiving Party must keep information secret and not disclose without consent.
Return or destroy on request within 30 days.
Governed by the laws of Germany.
Receiving Party indemnifies the Disclosing Party for any breach.

risk_flags.rationale: Perpetual confidentiality term is unusual and hard to enforce.

citations.quote: whether or not marked as confidential
shall keep all Confidential Information secret
shall remain in effect in perpetuity
return or destroy all Confidential Information in its possession within thirty (30) days
automatically renews for successive twelve (12) month periods
